tests.query: What is the exit load for Mirae Asset Large Cap Fund?
tests.answer: If redeemed within 1 year (365 days) from the date of allotment, the exit load for Mirae Asset Large Cap Fund is 1%. If redeemed after 1 year (365 days) from the date of allotment, there is no exit load. Source: https://www.miraeassetmf.co.in/docs/default-source/sid/sid-mirae-asset-largecap-fund_211

tests.query: What is the lock-in period for Mirae Asset ELSS Tax Saver Fund?
tests.answer: The lock-in period for Mirae Asset ELSS Tax Saver Fund is 3 years. Source: https://www.miraeassetmf.co.in/docs/default-source/application-form-kim/14-kim---mirae-asset-elss-tax-saver-fund_sept2025.pdf

tests.query: What is the minimum SIP amount for Mirae Asset ELSS?
tests.answer: The minimum SIP amount for Mirae Asset ELSS Tax Saver Fund is ₹500 for 5 installments, with multiples of ₹500 thereafter. Source: https://www.miraeassetmf.co.in/docs/default-source/application-form-kim/14-kim---mirae-asset-elss-tax-saver-fund_sept2025.pdf

tests.query: What is the benchmark index for Mirae Asset Liquid Fund?
tests.answer: The benchmark index for Mirae Asset Liquid Fund is the NIFTY Liquid Index A-I. Source: https://www.miraeassetmf.co.in/docs/default-source/sid/24-sid-mirae-asset-liquid-fund_sept2025.pdf

tests.query: What is the riskometer rating of Mirae Asset Flexi Cap Fund?
tests.answer:
The riskometer rating of Mirae Asset Flexi Cap Fund is as of October 31, 2025. For the latest riskometer, investors are advised to refer to the Monthly Portfolios disclosed on the fund's website. 

Source: https://www.miraeassetmf.co.in/docs/default-source/application-form-kim/15-kim---mirae-asset-f
